channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple pothole repairs of such poor quality riding a bicycle over the area is dangerous, 28th April
item.description:
Mini roundabouts next to Holy Trinity Church on junctions of Old Cheltenham Road, Paygrove Lane and Church Road, Longlevens. Surface so uneven and cratered following poor pothole repairs and existing unfilled holes that traversing the area is dangerous for cyclists. It is not possible to safely signal turning right from Old Cheltenham Road into Paygrove Lane. Crossing the area one hand on handlebars will result in being dismounted due to state of the road surface. Not signalling can result in vehicles approaching from Church Road assuming cyclists are going straight ahead, leaving cyclists in danger of being hit as they turn right. Using the pavement to cross the area is not safe for pedestrians or school children.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green traffic light not working., 28th April
item.description:
Traffic light on the left hand side facing you as you are heading out of Cheltenham has had no green light working for a few days now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Massive failure of previous repair by a contractor who should be brought back to rectify - particularly dangerous for cyclists as it runs for several meters, 28th April
item.description:
As the pin. Completely obvious & a danger to drivers & cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light out, 28th April
item.description:
Street light not working.

item.title: Pathway from opposite Ellison Close, 28th April
item.description:
Looks like new outbuildings erected and old materials just left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Discovery Road, Gloucester

item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Cones still in place south and northbound, 28th April
item.description:
Lane closure both north and southbound on Valiant Way south of the new roundabout, after National Grid works supposedly finished by 8.40am on 28 April. There are no signs up indicating that these works are the lighting works further up the road. Permit notice HM7522542448
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valiant Way, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped item, 28th April
item.description:
Large chair opposite 4 Marle Hill Parade

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Marle Hill Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes along this stretch of road, 28th April
item.description:
Multiple potholes the length of Lansdown Parade in the middle of Road. As the road is only wide enough for one car to pass if cars are parked on either side, it makes it hard to avoid them. Also a hazard for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Lansdown Parade, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead chestnut tree junction of Albert Rd. and Pittville lawn, 28th April
item.description:
No leaf at all last year or this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: Dangerous pavement, 28th April
item.description:
Pavement near bus shelter is dangerous as it has a slope to it which makes people in wheelchairs and people using pushchairs slope off to one side at an angle it is also dangerous for elderly people with walkers or with shopping trolleys as the sloping pavement makes the item being pushed want to tip over my elderly mother recently fell at this location and broke her elbow in two places .the pavement is also uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whaddon Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole, 28th April
item.description:
Outside of Pheassnt Cottage Pheasant Lane Cheltenham Glos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pheasant Lane, Golden Valley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A complete sweep of the gutters in Appleton Way is required., 28th April
item.description:
Email of 28/4/26 0814 hours - and I live at 49 Appleton Way Hucclecote Gloucester GL3 3RP I should be most grateful if the gutters could be swept on the Appleton Way complex in Hucclecote due to the fact that yesterday after completing some gardening at the front of our house, I swept the guttering directly outside our house but noticed that a complete sweep of the Appleton Way is required. Thank you in anticipation
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appleton Way, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple 15 inch potholes on runnings Road, 28th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit L1,L2, Runnings Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken up pavement near 159 Hucclecote road, 28th April
item.description:
Very poor condition footway on coat Road adjacent to the junction with Folland Avenue possibly the result of poor reinstatement following utility works

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 28th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please lift and relay x1 sunken broardbox lid and frame 460x320x40mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 28th April
item.description:
Permanent Repair Missing Block Paving 200 x 110 x 81mm Standard TM - Footway Closure - Alternative Footway Available (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 28th April
item.description:
EMERGENCY 2HOUR FWPH (Missing Block Paving) 200 x 110 x 81mm Please Make Safe Standard TM - Footway Closure - Alternative Footway Available (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal closure of footway from James Way to Hucclecote Road, 28th April
item.description:
The roadworks on Hucclecote Road have been in place for about two weeks now there is no sign of any statutory notice saying that the footway from James Way has been closed All for that matter the footway that has been obstructed by bollards. statutory undertakers should be made to follow the right rules before starting work and not casually ignore the law

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 28th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 800x700x40mm approx number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 28th April
item.description:
